"The layout structure and typography show significant deviations from the Figma design. Colors and component styling partially match, but there are notable discrepancies in icon assets and interaction states."
62/100
LIVE · https://mtfuji-test.elixa.ai/logbook
FIGMA · Configurations
Dimension Analysis
Layout & Structure
partial
55
Grid and alignment are mostly consistent, but column widths and panel placements differ.
  • Column widths in the table do not match the Figma design.
  • The search bar is misaligned compared to the Figma frame.
  • The 'Create new Logbook' button placement is inconsistent.
  • Sidebar menu items are not aligned as per the design.
Typography
deviates
45
Font sizes and weights differ, especially in headings and body text.
  • Heading font size is smaller than in the Figma design.
  • Body text weight is lighter than specified.
  • Line heights are inconsistent with the design.
  • Font style for table headers does not match.
Colors
partial
70
Background and text colors mostly match, but accent and border colors show discrepancies.
  • Accent color for buttons is slightly off.
  • Border color around the table is darker than in the design.
Component Styling
partial
65
Button and input styles are mostly consistent, but table styles and card borders differ.
  • Table row styling does not match the Figma design.
  • Button radius is larger than specified.
Icons & Assets
deviates
50
Icon presence and style are inconsistent with the design.
  • Icons in the sidebar are missing.
  • Icon sizes in the table header are incorrect.
Interactions & States
partial
60
Hover and active states are mostly implemented, but loading and dropdown states differ.
  • Hover state for buttons is not as per design.
  • Dropdown interaction is missing animations.
Content Accuracy
partial
75
Labels and placeholders are mostly accurate, but some error messages and copy differ.
  • Placeholder text in search bar is incorrect.
  • Error message formatting does not match the design.

PRD · Acceptance Criteria PM

IDCriterionStatusEvidence
AC-1 Admin sees a list of all logbooks in a table with columns: Name, Description, Plant, Facility, Created By, Last Updated. fail —
AC-2 Typing in the search bar filters the list by logbook name in real time. pass s0 s1 s2
AC-3 Dropdown filters for Plant and Facility are available and functional. pass s0 s1 s2
AC-4 Clicking 'Create new logbook' opens a modal where the admin can input Name, Description, Plant, and Facility. pass s0 s1 s2
AC-5 Each logbook row has a 3-dot menu with options: View log history, Edit & configure, Pin, and Delete. pass s0 s1 s2
AC-6 All fields in the logbook creation modal are mandatory, and errors are shown for empty/invalid inputs. pass s0 s1 s2
AC-7 Pinned logbooks are visually highlighted and shown before the logbook name. pass s0 s1 s2
AC-8 If no logbooks exist or no results match the search/filter, show a clean empty state message. pass s0 s1 s2
AC-9 Admin is redirected to the configuration screen immediately after successful creation of a logbook. pass s0 s1 s2
AC-10 Admin can add multiple fields from the right panel (text, checklist, dropdown, long text, attachments, table). pass s0 s1 s2
AC-11 Admin clicks the Preview button to view the logbook layout as it would appear to users. pass s0 s1 s2
AC-12 Admin can filter the list of past logbooks by date, shift, and logged by. pass s0 s1 s2
AC-13 User can search specific logbooks using comment text. fail —
AC-14 Admin can access the 'Generate Report' popup from the logbook 3 dot menu and selecting 'Report generation settings'. fail —
AC-15 If either report frequency or recipients field is left unfilled, an error should appear prompting the user to complete the missing fields. pass s0 s1 s2
